images.title: Paysage sous-marin de Méditerranée (Ifremer 00729-84121 - 37704).jpg
images.description: Mediterranean seabed, observed off the coast of Nice during a dive.

images.title: EMSO-Ligure Nice - Ajout d'une enceinte électronique sur l'une des stations sous-marines de l'observatoire (Ifremer 00623-73508 - 37753).jpg
images.description: Connected to land by an electro-optical cable, this station powers the measuring instruments connected to it and transmits their data in real time via the Internet. The Observatory, developed by the Research and Technological Development Unit (RDT) of the Physical Resources and Seabed Ecosystems Department (REM) of Ifremer, is deployed on the narrow continental shelf bordering the coast of Nice. The area has been instrumented for many years with a dual scientific objective: to assess the factors triggering instabilities and to characterize the dynamics of the flow once the triggering has occurred.
